perRowProtocol: apply exactly one declared production mutation with IDE apply_patch
run unchanged child command through tool-log with recovery-mutation-red tag
require nonzero exit and the declared assertion or protected title
restore exact production text with IDE apply_patch
run unchanged child command through tool-log with recovery-mutation-green tag
require exit zero before the next row

g044RecoveryBaseline.proves: The comprehensive repository state inherited by Scopes 2-5 after Scope 1 recovery acceptance.
g044RecoveryBaseline.cannotProve: The command outcomes before Scope 1 implementation or pre-implementation chronology.
g044RecoveryBaseline.feature005Attribution: Palm Springs paths, titles, outcomes, and failure signatures remain owned by Feature 005 and are never rewritten by Feature 006.

scope1ContainmentContract.sharedHunkStart: /* ---------- Feature 006: Trend Dynamics deterministic capability foundation ---------- */

markdownStructureContract.scopeDoDLabels: unique scope-qualified plain-text labels compatible with the current traceability parser

tests.description: Extract Scope 1 production symbols and prove config, source, as-of, transform, quality, numeric, cycle-type, RLDATA, and RLAPP invariants.
tests.command: node scripts/selftest.mjs

recoveryProof.expectedRedSignal: Trend Dynamics level transform preserves observation lineage without interpolation

tests.description: Accept valid closed fixtures and reject unknown, non-finite, dangling, and incompatible records with exact TDC codes.
tests.command: node scripts/validate-trend-dynamics-cycle.mjs

tests.description: Parse every inline script and require every literal getElementById target to exist.
tests.command: PAGE=trend-dynamics-cycle-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'

recoveryProof.expectedRedSignal: Regression: SCN-006-011 technology attention remains a lifecycle proxy not an oscillation

tests.command: PAGE=trend-dynamics-cycle-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'
